description: The user shall be able to Login as a prerequisite before accessing system functionalities
The user shall be able to participate in the screening test, after login
The user shall be able to view the classified screening test results, following the screening test
The user shall be able to view report summarizing the screening test results, following the screening test
The user shall be able to choose personalized educational content to support learning
The user shall be able to launch lessons through an internal service that automates the extraction of main keywords from selected content, thus preparing it for tutoring
The user shall be able to engage in learning lessons tailored to their specific needs using personalized games and activities
The child doesn’t need to have prior language knowledge; the system automates language learning based on age and proficiency level
Users can initiate a screening test, view reports, and choose content for learning
Users can navigate the lessons roadmap, choosing specific lessons tailored to their needs
